The '''Habassa''' was the [[Habassa system/Legends|Habassa system's]] primary race.

==History==
They were an isolationist race and far from the interests of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] for millennia. Even the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] didn't pursue them aggressively. Despite their isolationism, the Habassa used ships common throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], such as [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]].

Their first involvement in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] was in a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]] assembly area during an Imperial raid that had consisted of [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and CR90 corvettes. The Rebels stopped the attack, but needed to evacuate the assembly area. The Habassa sent the ship ''[[Habatok 2]]'' to rescue the station crew. The evacuation was successful.

Afterward, the Rebel Alliance attempted to make the Habassa a new ally. After a meeting held on board the [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']], the Habassa were officially made a member of the Alliance, but wanted to show a neutral stance outward. However, this didn't stop the Empire from attacking them. The Empire enslaved a portion of the Habassa people, but the Alliance rescued them. Later, the Habassa helped the Alliance to destroy the Imperial Star Destroyer [[Relentless (Sunaj IV)|''Relentless'']].

The Habassa also directed the Alliance towards the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]] for their new base.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]'' {{1st}}
